title: ThirtyFangs's Kingdom
description: This datapack adds a few vanilla friendly structures to the world, such as custom villages, castles, temples and more!
body:
# Features

- New villages types
- Deepslate castle
- Haunted mansion (with exclusive, vanilla friendly loots you can't get in normal survival)
- 2 brand new temples (one in the overworld, one in the nether)
- Pillager fortress
- Improved forests
